zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Munning於1456年出生在英國素福爾可內吉時，他的父親John Munning26歲，母親Margaret Woodward22歲。他於1475年與Alice Pye在英國素福爾可內吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1521年11月在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可內吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Munning于1456年出生在英国素福爾可內吉时，他的父亲John Munning26岁，母亲Margaret Woodward22岁。他于1475年与Alice Pye在英国素福爾可內吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1521年11月在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可內吉。

nameMeanings.name: Munning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English * Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund).

variants.name: Munnings
meanings: English (Suffolk): variant of Munning, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Munning is from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund). This form of the surname is the more common one in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Munning was born in 1456, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, his father, John Munning, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Woodward, was 22. He married Alice Pye in 1475, in Nedging, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in November 1521, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Nedging, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Munning est né en 1456, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Munning, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Woodward, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Pye en 1475, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Munning 1456 in Nedging, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Munning 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Woodward 22. Er hat 1475 in Nedging, Suffolk, England Alice Pye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im November 1521 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nedging, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Munning è nato il nel 1456 nel Nedging, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Munning, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Woodward, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Pye nel 1475, nel Nedging, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1521, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Nedging, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Munningが1456年にイギリススフォルクネドジングで生まれた時，父John Munningは26歳，母Margaret Woodwardは22歳であった。1475年にイギリススフォルクネドジングでAlice Pyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1521年11月に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクネドジングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Munning(이)가 1456년 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Munning(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Woodward(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 Alice Pye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 11월 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 네지잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Munning nasceu em 1456, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Munning, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Woodward, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Pye em 1475, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1521, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Munning родился в 1456 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Munning было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Woodward, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Pye в 1475 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1521 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Munning nació en 1456, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Munning, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Woodward, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice Pye en 1475, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1521, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
